name: East Nusa Tenggara (Indonesia)
description: A green field charged at the centre with the complex.
history: Used by the Provincial Government of East Nusa Tenggara, the Christian-majority eastern Indonesian province encompassing the islands of Flores, Sumba, Timor and others.

features.symbolism: provincial coat of arms on a field

features.role: Coat of arms of the Province of East Nusa Tenggara (Nusa Tenggara Timur)
